description: Style Noteestelle considers desi obsession with bangles and gives the traditional accessory a season lift with their latest bracelet collection. This bracelet strikes the right balance between the  ethnic and the edgy. If you're styling your outfit with bangles and bracelets of two tones, this piece is a great add. This bracelet is also a great substitute for noisy glass bangles when you're decked up in an ethnic ensemble!Warranty: 1 yearProduct DetailsSilver wave-shaped bracelet with a butterfly claspHas stone embellishments all overMaterial and care24 carat silver platedPewter base metalHigh quality imported Crystals/CZsWipe with a clean cotton swab to remove dustSizeBracelet thickness: 0.5 cmDiameter: 5.5 cm
